name: Large Baseline - 12 Clients No Disagreements
description: Baseline scenario with 12 clients and no disagreements. All clients collaborate normally on the global track. This serves as a performance baseline for comparison with scenario 16 which has the same number of clients but with ring disagreements. Only applicable to MNIST experiments due to the number of clients being larger than 6.

round_1_rules.description: All 12 clients should be on the global track
